headline: Micron Technology (MU): Top 10 Stock to Benefit From AI
summary: Micron Technology, Inc. (NASDAQ:MU) is one of the Top 10 Stocks That Will Profit from AI. The company is also one of the three major global memory manufacturers of High Bandwidth Memory (HBM3E), a critical component for the world’s most powerful AI GPUs. On April 28, 2026, D.A. Davidson initiated coverage on Micron Technology, Inc. […]
